mnemonics: C.A.S.T. for Cloud Learning: Certifications (AWS/Azure), Articles (NIST/CSA), SANS Training, Tool Docs (AWS/Azure)
keyPoints: Official cloud provider documentation (AWS, Azure, GCP) is the primary resource
NIST Special Publications (800-series) provide critical security frameworks
SANS Institute offers specialized cloud security training and whitepapers
commonMistakes: Relying solely on unofficial blogs without verifying against official documentation
Overlooking free tier hands-on labs from cloud providers for practical experience
Ignoring compliance frameworks specific to your industry (HIPAA, PCI DSS, GDPR)
